text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 85 

HCBS_TECH_DPNDNT_MF_CC_IND 

LABEL: HCBS Tech Dep Medically Fragile State-Reported Chronic Condition Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary had the Home and Community Based Services (HCBS) Non-
health home Chronic Condition “Technology Dependent/Medically Fragile”; most recent in the 
calendar year. 

SHORT NAME:
